# Meta data

<pre>
Ramon benchmark for Z3
-
Job description: QF_LIA, all random
Job tag: lia_w_all_rand_p5_qflia_60_rs_603
Runner: rise-runner-2
Z3 repo: Z3Prover/z3
Z3 commit: 029ce10d222a8451f35ffca7eef40e57963b8b88
Z3 branch: lia_w
Z3 options: "-T:60 smt.random_seed=603 lp.cut_period=5"
Z3 inputs: https://zenodo.org/records/16740866/files/QF_LIA.tar.zst?download=1
Z3 commit message: Randomize should_* decision gates in int_solver

Replace deterministic m_number_of_calls % period gates with
settings().random_next(period) == 0 for should_find_cube,
should_find_lcube, should_solve_dioph_eq and should_hnf_cut,
matching the existing should_gomory_cut approach. This keeps the
same expected 1/period firing rate while avoiding phase-locking
with the search. Removes the now-unused m_number_of_calls member.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

</pre>
